game_info.title: Sonic JS Platformer
game_info.concept: **ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ 2** Sonic The Hedgehog 2 is a fast-paced 2D side-scrolling platformer where players control Sonic using an on-screen virtual D-pad for horizontal movement and a jump button to leap, with a second tap activating a spin dash. Levels are filled with loops, springs, and enemies, which are defeated by jumping on them or using a spin attack, while collecting 100 rings grants an extra life and rings protect from single hits. Progression involves completing multiple zones, each with 2-3 acts culminating in a boss battle against Dr. Eggman, with difficulty scaling through increasingly complex level layouts and enemy patterns. Collecting 50 rings and entering a giant ring grants access to a 3D half-pipe Special Stage to collect 7 Chaos Emeralds, which unlock the Super Sonic transformation. Players lose a life if they take damage without rings or fall into a pit, and the game ends upon losing all lives or defeating the final boss.
game_info.description: You are a fast blue hedgehog speeding through a vibrant zone filled with green hills, palm trees, and robotic enemies. Your goal is to race to the end of the level while collecting golden rings. Rings protect you from damage; if you get hit while holding rings, you drop them, but if you have none, you lose a life. Jump on enemies to defeat them, use springs to reach new heights, and keep your momentum up to conquer the terrain!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left: Move Left
Arrow Right: Move Right
Space: Jump
Arrow Down (while moving): Roll / Spin
Arrow Down (while stationary) + Space: Spin Dash (Release Down to launch)
Shift: Sprint / Boost (optional mechanic for speed)
Z: Action / Interact
ENTER: Start Game
ESC: Pause Game
R: Restart Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement, ring collection, and jump physics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will hold the Right Arrow to accelerate the player, collecting rings on the path. It will press Space to jump over the first small gap or obstacle encountered.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player x-position increases significantly, ring count increases from 0, and player does not fall into pits or die.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify enemy collision and ring loss mechanic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The player will collect at least one ring, then intentionally walk into an enemy without jumping. Then, the player will attempt to recover a scattered ring.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Ring count drops to 0 upon impact, scattered rings appear, and the player survives the hit (game phase remains PLAYING).

TEST_3.strategy_description: The player moves right continuously, jumping over all obstacles and enemies perfectly to reach the end signpost.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN upon touching the goal post.
